title: USCIS Online Account Videos | USCIS
content:
## USCIS Online Account Videos
This page contains videos on how to use a USCIS online account when navigating certain forms and functions within the account. Learn more about the benefits of filing online through our secure system by visiting  our File Online page and creating a free USCIS online account. Visit our USCIS YouTube page for more helpful videos.

### How to Use PDF Upload to File Form I-129 (Play Video)

### Forms I-129 and I-907: How to File Online Using the Guided Workflow (Play Video)

### Uploading Evidence to a Draft Form in Your USCIS Online Account (Play Video)

### Add a Paper Case with an Online Access Code in your USCIS Online Account (Play Video)

### Apply for Citizenship Online: How to File Your Application for Naturalization Online (Play Video)

### USCIS Online Account: How to Respond to a Request for Evidence (Play Video)

### Organizational Accounts for Legal Representatives: Demonstration (Play Video)

### Organizational Accounts for Companies: Demonstration (Play Video)

### How to Change Your Email Address in Your USCIS Online Account (Play Video)

### How to Manage Your Case After Filing Online: Applicant Account (Play Video)
